title: What the Glacier Taught Us
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: Three generations of women reunite at a melting Alaskan glacier cabin when the matriarch reveals a diary written in a language no one can read, sparking a reckoning with their erased Indigenous heritage.
long_description: Three generations of women reunite at a melting Alaskan glacier cabin when the matriarch reveals a diary written in a language no one can read, sparking a reckoning with their erased Indigenous heritage.
